idea-plugin.name: Agent Skill Composer
idea-plugin.description:
Agent Skill Composer analyzes your Kotlin/Java project with native IDE APIs, then uses an AI provider of your choice to generate grounded agent-guidance artifacts for JetBrains Junie and Claude Code.

Unlike generic prompts, every artifact is anchored in real repository evidence: resolved dependencies (via OrderEnumerator), PSI-based convention detection, Kotlin/Java idiom analysis, API routes extracted from annotations, and representative code examples.

Features

  • Detects build system, frameworks, test frameworks, naming conventions, package structure, DI style, API routes, Kotlin idioms, concurrency model, validation, and multi-module layout.
  • Generates for Junie (.junie/AGENTS.md, .junie/skills/<id>/SKILL.md) and Claude Code (CLAUDE.md, .claude/skills/<id>/SKILL.md, .claude/commands/review-changes.md).
  • Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, Google Gemini, and any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (Ollama, Azure, local models).
  • API key stored securely via PasswordSafe; live model discovery — no hardcoded model IDs to go stale.
  • Preview artifacts as read-only editor tabs; single Save All action with overwrite confirmation.

Who it's for

Kotlin/Java teams adopting Junie or Claude Code who want project-specific agent instructions that reflect their actual conventions — not copy-pasted boilerplate.
